raw: OSINT account reported an explosion in Dolatabad Industrial Town north of Esfahan City on March 8. It is unclear what the combined force may have targeted; Iranian defense industrial sites are often located in industrial zones. An electronics manufacturing factory in Dolatabad previously exploded in December 2025 killing nine.
reason: Target unknown — no confirmed military facility identified at this location
suggested_location: Dolatabad Industrial Town, north of Esfahan City, Esfahan Province, Iran
